evidence: Long unbroken run of undersized TCP segments; possible segmentation-based IDS evasion
findings.summary: Excessive consecutive small segments (101) on flow 192.168.1.100:5900 → 192.168.1.120:50427

evidence: CIP service=0x54 (ForwardOpen) from src=192.168.1.100 session=2359298. No dedicated MITRE ICS technique for CIP connection establishment anomaly; T1692.001 applies only when connection demonstrably carries unauthorized command (ADR-010 Decision 7)
findings.summary: CIP ForwardOpen connection establishment observed from src=192.168.1.100: connection lifecycle anomaly

evidence: CIP service=0x4E (ForwardClose) from src=192.168.1.100 session=2359298. Connection lifecycle closed; no dedicated MITRE ICS technique (ADR-010 Decision 7)
findings.summary: CIP ForwardClose connection teardown observed from src=192.168.1.100: connection lifecycle closed
